description: Milestones 2-3: Enhanced SaaS template, codegen wiki, file impact maps, a11y hook, visual regression

tasks.title: Enhance saas-complete with Clerk + Drizzle + Stripe + premium CSS

Template has premium CSS utilities in globals.css
